description: Analyze the stall characteristics of the NREL 5MW Reference turbine using the project file at /home/ga/Documents/sample_projects/NREL_5MW_Reference.wpa. Perform a HAWT BEM Range Simulation for wind speeds from 5 m/s to 25 m/s (1 m/s steps) at a fixed rotational speed of 9 RPM and 0 degrees pitch. Export the simulation results to /home/ga/Documents/projects/stall_simulation_data.txt. Identify the peak power and the wind speed at which it occurs, recording both values in a report at /home/ga/Documents/projects/stall_report.txt. Save the completed project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/stall_analysis.wpa.
